description: Maps ZNX AI agent slots to Open Dental API fields. Used to translate structured data collected during the call into a valid Open Dental appointment or patient record write.

appointment_write.notes: AptDateTime must be constructed from preferred_date + preferred_time slots after checking against available slots via GET /appointments/available. Do not write directly without availability check.

patient_lookup.notes: Used for returning patient verification. If match found, use PatNum for appointment write. If no match, treat as new patient.

patient_create.notes: Only create if patient_lookup returns no match and patient_type == 'new'.

fields.Descript: Formatted string: 'Insurance verification needed: [patient_first_name] [patient_last_name] DOB [date_of_birth] — Provider: [insurance_provider] Member ID: [member_id]'

error_handling.patient_not_found: Treat as new patient. Create patient record before appointment write.
error_handling.slot_unavailable: Return two alternative available slots to agent. Do not book without caller confirmation.
error_handling.api_timeout: Queue appointment data locally. Retry up to 3 times. Flag for manual staff review if all retries fail.
error_handling.missing_required_field: Return error to agent. Agent will re-prompt caller for missing field.
